description_long: This is a rectangular, modern microwave oven with a matte gray exterior and a large, dark-tinted window on the front door. The door occupies most of the front face, with a vertical handle on the right side and a control panel area adjacent to it. The left and right sides are plain, while the back features five evenly spaced vertical vents for heat dissipation. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible branding or decorative elements. The microwave appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with a glass or plastic window and plastic components for the handle and control panel.
description: A sleek, gray microwave with a large front window, vertical handle, and rear ventilation slots. Its design is minimal and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large dark window, vertical handle on the right, and a control panel area.
description_view_1: Left side view, plain and featureless with a smooth gray surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying five vertical ventilation slots evenly spaced across the back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view, plain and featureless like the left side.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is located vertically on the right side of the front face, adjacent to the door handle. It appears as a single rectangular section, but no individual buttons, dials, or display features are visibly detailed.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is a vertical rectangular bar positioned on the right edge of the front door. It is integrated into the door, likely made of plastic, and extends the full height of the door for easy gripping.
attribute_vent_placement: Five vertical vents are located on the rear panel, evenly spaced and running from near the top to near the bottom of the back surface.
attribute_window_presence: A large, dark, rectangular window is present on the front door, occupying most of the door's surface.
